positive: A minimalist illustration of a stylized forest creature, blending elements of a fox, deer, and constellation map. The composition should feature the creature in a graceful, jumping silhouette against a deep indigo night sky filled with luminous, abstract constellations and glowing bioluminescent flora. Use clean linework, highly saturated jewel tones (sapphire, emerald, amethyst), and a strong central composition. The style should be a blend of Art Nouveau organic curves and modern flat vector graphic design, optimized for apparel printing. Emphasize strong contrast between the black silhouettes and the glowing background elements. Whimsical, ethereal, and magical.
